title: The National Green Tribunal Act, 2010
full_text: The National Green Tribunal Act, 2010 राष्‍ट्रीय हरित अधिकरण अधिनियम, 2010 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 201019 Act Number: 19 Enactment Date: 2010-06-02 Act Year: 2010 Short Title: The National Green Tribunal Act, 2010 Hindi Title: राष्‍ट्रीय हरित अधिकरण अधिनियम, 2010 Long Title: An Act to provide for the establishment of a National Green Tribunal for the effective and expeditious disposal of cases relating to environmental protection and conservation of forests and other natural resources including enforcement of any legal right relating to environment and giving relief and compensation for damages to persons and property and for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change Enforcement Date: 18-10-2010 Notification: 18th October, 2010, vide notification No. S.O 2569(E), dated 18th October, 2010, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii). Schedule 1. SCHEDULE I. Order Appendix Forms Schedule 2. SCHEDULE II. Order Appendix Forms Schedule 3. SCHEDULE III Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The National Green Tribunal Act, 2010 CHAPTER I PRELIMINARY CHAPTER II ESTABLISHMENT OF THE TRIBUNAL CHAPTER III JURISDICTION, POWERS AND PROCEEDINGS OF THE TRIBUNAL CHAPTER IV PENALTY CHAPTER V MISCELLANEOUS Section 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Establishment of Tribunal. Show Related Subordinates Section 4. Composition of Tribunal. Show Related Subordinates Section 5. Qualifications for appointment of Chairperson, Judicial Member and Expert Member. Section 6. Appointment of Chairperson, Judicial Member and Expert Member. Show Related Subordinates Section 7. Term of office and other conditions of service of Chairperson, Judicial Member and Expert Member. Show Related Subordinates Section 8. Resignation. Section 9. Salaries, allowances and other terms and conditions of service. Section 10. Removal and suspension of Chairperson, Judicial Member and Expert Member. Section 10A. Qualifications, terms and conditions of service of Chairperson, Judicial Member and Expert Member. Section 11. To act as Chairperson of Tribunal or to discharge his functions in certain circumstances. Show Related Subordinates Section 12. Staff of Tribunal. Show Related Subordinates Section 13. Financial and administrative powers of Chairperson. Show Related Subordinates Section 14. Tribunal to settle disputes. Section 15. Relief, compensation and restitution. Section 16. Tribunal to have appellate jurisdiction. Section 17. Liability to pay relief or compensation in certain cases. Section 18. Application or appeal to Tribunal. Section 19. Procedure and powers of Tribunal. Section 20. Tribunal to apply certain principles. Section 21. Decision to be taken by majority. Section 22. Appeal to Supreme Court. Section 23. Cost. Section 24. Deposit of amount payable for damage to environment. Section 25. Execution of award or order or decision of Tribunal. Section 26. Penalty for failure to comply with orders of Tribunal. Section 27. Offences by companies. Section 28. Offences by Government Department. Section 29. Bar of jurisdiction. Section 30. Cognizance of offences. Show Related Subordinates Section 31. Members and staff of Tribunal to be public servants. Section 32. Protection of action taken in good faith. Section 33. Act to have overriding effect. Section 34. Power to amend Schedule I. Section 35. Power to make rules. Show Related Subordinates Section 36. Amendment of certain enactments. Section 37. Power to remove difficulties. Section 38. Repeal and savings. Schedule 1.
